title: Valderheim
description: To tell a great story, you need a great world to base it in...
body:
### Welcome to Valderheim
A full RPG story awaits, one that can be explored alone, or with friends. There are many paths to choose from, so many things to see and so much to do. However, there's one thing that's for sure... it won't be easy. 

This modpack was created as a mid-light weight, but feature packed modpack, tailored so people on lower end devices could play. We made sure to include as many great mods as possible for the best expererience, along with customizing recipes and attributes to make them flow better together. Some of the main mods/additions in our repotoire include:
- Create (along with various addons)
- Ice and Fire
- Regions Unexplored
- Biomes o' Plenty
- Iron's Spells and Spellbooks
- Marium's soulslike weaponry
- Farmer's Delight
- Deeper and Darker
- Eidolon:Repraised
- Apotheosis (Zenith)
- A Full quest tree for balanced progression _**(see disclaimer below)**_
- The Kilt Project
- And much more!

_**Special thanks to the Kilt team for making this whole project possible.**_

I want to just say, I'm very excited for the I+F2 Project, it will vastly improve this pack, as soon as it releases (as long as it's compatible with or doesn't need Kilt) I will put it into the pack, stay tuned!

## **DISCLAIMER(S):**

This modpack is still being heavily tested, please report ALL issues to me BEFORE the developers of ANY mods. Any issues can be DM'd to me on Discord, @drippyrussianguy

allocate roughly 14GB or more RAM for best performance
(I am working on making that number lower, just give me some time) 

**Several mods that are required in the pack are only availible on curseforge, the following links are downloads for all the mods needed**

- [FTB Quests](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-quests-fabric/download/6431736)
- [FTB Teams](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-teams-fabric/download/6130783)
- [FTB Library](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-library-fabric/download/6807422)
- [FTB Filter System](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-filter-system/download/6466152)
- [FTB Xmod Compat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-xmod-compat/download/6402485)

**This resource pack is not required but is highly reccomended**
- [Frostbite + Brimstone](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/frostbiteandbrimstone/files/6858165)
